3d5cca146191.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
3d5cca146191.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
3d5cca146191.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

1f664f89be20.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
1f664f89be20.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
1f664f89be20.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

f3fde9f60f8d.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
f3fde9f60f8d.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

7efe444cf25f.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
7efe444cf25f.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
7efe444cf25f.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

eedc00aade55.title: Ranked #8 of 10 locally — peers are ahead
eedc00aade55.description: At percentile 22.2, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

b7bce43c08d3.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
b7bce43c08d3.description: You trail peers by 2.1 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
